attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
WI_ALLOC.RSTD_IDRT_REV_COGS_ADJ_ALC_KEY 	REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
-9999								SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-9999								SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WI_ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_KEY				PRODUCT_KEY,
-9999								AR_TRX_KEY,
-9999								AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999								BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
-999								END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WI_ALLOC.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY	BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WI_ALLOC.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY	SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WI_ALLOC.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY		SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WI_ALLOC.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY			SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
-9999								DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
(CASE WHEN 
NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL          
THEN -996 ELSE NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY END) GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN'							SALES_REP_NUMBER,
Cast(-9999 As Integer)				BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
Cast(-999 As Integer)				BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
Cast(-999 As Integer)				BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
( NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT * 100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ) 	DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
WI_ALLOC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD	DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )			DD_GL_DATETIME,
NULL								DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN'							BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE			DV_FISCAL_DT,
NULL								DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN'							DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN'							DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL								DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN'								BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
CAST ( NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) 								AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 'IND_ADJ'							REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 'UNKWOWN'							DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 'Y'								DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 'Y'								DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 'N'								DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 'N'								DV_MISC_FLG,
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END 	DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'N'								DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 'N'								DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 'Y'								DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WI_ALLOC.REVENUE_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT		DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
0										DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
0										DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM  ,
WI_ALLOC.COGS_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT		DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
0										DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
WI_ALLOC.REVENUE_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT 	DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
0										DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
(CASE WHEN EASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ADJ_TYPE_ID < 5000 AND EASMP.MEASURE_ID = 2 
AND ROOT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID ='GMBREVMGN' THEN WI_ALLOC.COGS_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT ELSE 0 END)	DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
0										DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
0										DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
0										DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER                    EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
USER                       EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
WI_ALLOC.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD			BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WI_ALLOC.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE		BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE as GL_DT,
NULL BK_SS_CD ,                        
0 DV_EXTENDED_QTY    ,              
0 GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ,      
0 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,    
NULL OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,         
NULL ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD      ,           
NULL TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,  
NULL WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,     
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE TRANSACTION_DT,
NULL GL_POSTED_DTM ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
0 DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
0 DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT, 
0 DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT, 
0 SPLIT_PCT, 
NULL     BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
'UNK'                BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 
'N' DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG, 
'R' DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG, 
'N' RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG, 
'I' 									ACTION_CODE,
'I'										DML_TYPE,
-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,          
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,       
-9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,   
PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,  
'STANDALONE' AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
'N' AS DV_FMV_FLG,
0 DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
0 DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
0 DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-999 XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N' ), /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, 'N')AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */           
COALESCE((CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END),'N')  /* RO proj, Q3FY17  16th March release*/

/*RO SEPTFY18 REL*/

, WI_ALLOC.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 

FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_IDRT_REV_COGS_ADJ_ALC WI_ALLOC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON( WI_ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
	AND WI_ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB EASMP
	ON (WI_ALLOC.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = EASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (WI_ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_TYPE NIRCAT
                ON ( NIRCAT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID= WI_ALLOC.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
AND WI_ALLOC.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE = NIRCAT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE LEAF
                ON ( NIRCAT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = LEAF.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
                AND LEAF.NODE_TYPE= 'LEAF' )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE MIDDLE1
                ON ( MIDDLE1.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = LEAF.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID 
                AND MIDDLE1.NODE_TYPE = 'MIDDLE')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE MIDDLE2
                ON ( MIDDLE2.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = MIDDLE1.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
                AND MIDDLE2.NODE_TYPE = 'MIDDLE' )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE ROOT
                ON ( ROOT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = MIDDLE2.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID 
                AND ROOT.NODE_TYPE= 'ROOT' )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
   ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     = -999
and NGLA.ss_code ='QTC')
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP WHERE BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD='STANDALONE') OMAP
ON OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
AND OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=WI_ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_KEY
